Village Sports Club
August 18, 2024
 
·
Monday operations still extended from August 19 to October 28, 2024 (1PM - 10PM). Take note of the facilities that are open:
• Basketball Court
• Badminton Court
• Pickleball Court
• Volleyball Court
• Tennis Court
• Archery (1pm to 5pm)
• Locker… See more

analysis.reason: Post clearly describes a physical sports club with a pickleball court but the page content does not include a usable address or city within the requested scope (Parañaque, Metro Manila). Require location/address to mark as ready.
